_readme: Only used for currency/manual fields that no export can provide. As of Jul 2026, every historical aircraft (2017-2025) has a real per-flight source file (logbook-historical.csv, logbook-sfs.csv) — there is no more manual gap_aircraft data. If a new gap ever appears (a school/period with no export), add a 'gap_aircraft' array back here; the workflow still supports it.
